events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need decide pass/fail. Scenario: weep holes missing/blocked at bottom course in flashing & weeps residential masonry. Work rough-complete. Need assess compliance per TMS 402 and BIA tech notes. Weep holes required in masonry veneer/cavity walls to drain water. Missing/blocked = non-compliant, installed-defective. Decision fail. Risk? Water intrusion, moisture damage, mold. Residential. Could be high if not corrected. Maybe high. Work stage rough-complete. Percent complete maybe 90? Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Findings: weep holes absent or obstructed at bottom course; no drainage path for cavity. Actions: clear/open weep holes at prescribed spacing (e.g., max 24" o.c., above grade, with through-wall flashing), install weeps per code/manufacturer. Rationale: TMS 402 and BIA require weep holes at base of walls to drain water accumulating in cavity; missing/blocked prevents drainage and can cause moisture damage. References: TMS 402 (Building Code Requirements for Masonry Structures) for anchored masonry veneer, BIA Tech Notes 7, 7A, 7B etc. Need valid JSON only. Ensure no prose outside. Need include all fields. sound_source etc default empty string/0/list. order empty list, workable empty list. event_time 0, rate 0. value 0. confidence maybe 0.95. percent_complete maybe 85. Let's craft.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 85,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Weep holes are missing or blocked at the bottom course of the masonry wall.",
    "No effective drainage path is provided for water that enters the wall cavity.",
    "Condition can trap moisture behind the veneer and lead to water damage or deterioration."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Open or install weep holes at the bottom course per code-required spacing and location.",
    "Ensure weeps are kept clear of mortar droppings and obstructions.",
    "Verify through-wall flashing is present and properly sloped to drain to the weeps.",
    "Re-inspect before closing out the wall."
  ],
  "rationale": "TMS 402 and BIA guidance require weep holes at the base of masonry veneer/cavity walls to drain water to the exterior. Missing or blocked weep holes prevent proper drainage, making the installation non-compliant and creating a high risk of moisture-related damage.",
  "references": [
    "TMS 402 Building Code Requirements for Masonry Structures",
    "BIA Technical Notes 7, 7A, 7B - Water Resistance of Brick Masonry"
  ]
}
